arts.ttl: Arsenal receive unexpected Kai Havertz injury boost
arts.sum: Arsenal have been robbed of Kai Havertz up front since the start of February.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Arsenal win Gyokeres race with €135m bid
arts.sum: Arsenal are set to win the race for Sporting CP striker Viktor Gyokeres with a huge offer for the Sweden hitman. New sporting director Andrea Berta has cooled interest in RB Leipzig hitman Benjamin Sesko to focus on Gyokeres and is now prepared to make a bid worth over €135 million to secure the services of the prolific 26-year-old’s No.9, Correio Da Manha confirms.

arts.ttl: 'Best natural talent I've ever seen': Ainsley Maitland-Niles says £25m attacker Arsenal want to sign is an 'absolute master'
arts.sum: Arsenal are likely to be busy in the summer transfer window as Mikel Arteta and Andrea Berta look to bolster their ranks. Despite having had...

arts.ttl: Brentford star wears Real Madrid jersey to training ahead of facing Arsenal
arts.sum: Recent developments at the training ground of Premier League outfit Brentford have late this week piqued attentions in Spain. This comes after a member of Thomas Frank’s squad was spotted…

arts.ttl: Declan Rice could be the greatest English midfielder of his generation, claims Jamie Carragher, who compares him to iconic Premier League star
arts.sum: Rice broke the deadlock with an exceptional free-kick from range, before following it up just 12 minutes later with an even better effort that arced into the top corner.

arts.ttl: What Vinai Venkatesham will bring to Tottenham after key role in Arsenal rebuild
arts.sum: Former CEO was a hugely popular figure over 14 years with the Gunners and takes plenty of expertise across the north London divide

arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal vs. Brentford injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Arsenal and Brentford.

arts.ttl: ‘For sure’: Fabrizio Romano says £55m Arsenal target is definitely leaving now
arts.sum: The summer transfer window isn’t a million miles away, and the main movers this summer are likely to be centre-forwards. Alexander Isak has been linked...

Brentford have won their last two away London derby matches in the Premier League, having lost seven in a row on the road before. However we have lost just one of our last 15 league London derbies, scoring at least five times in five of those, and our latest capital clash provides the perfect chance to keep our momentum snowballing before we head to Spain with a semi-final spot on the line.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives major Kai Havertz update after he tore hamstring during Dubai training camp in February
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: In an update to fans, the German posted a video on Thursday of himself undergoing rehabilitation work in the gym.
